# Watch list for the "interactive-templates" feature (interactive message templates:
# quick-reply / list / location-request builder at /interactive-message).
# One "<repo>:<path>" per line. repo = fe (../glific-frontend) | be (this repo, glific).
# The fingerprint = hash of these files' contents; if any changes, the cached test
# results are stale and the suite must be re-run.

# --- Frontend (builder form + list + options + GraphQL + mocks) ---
fe:src/containers/InteractiveMessage/InteractiveMessage.tsx
fe:src/containers/InteractiveMessage/InteractiveMessage.helper.ts
fe:src/containers/InteractiveMessage/InteractiveMessageList/InteractiveMessageList.tsx
fe:src/containers/InteractiveMessage/InteractiveOptions/InteractiveOptions.tsx
fe:src/mocks/InteractiveMessage.tsx
fe:src/graphql/mutations/InteractiveMessage.ts
fe:src/graphql/queries/InteractiveMessage.ts

# --- Backend (schema + context + resolver + GraphQL surface) ---
be:lib/glific/templates/interactive_template.ex
be:lib/glific/templates/interactive_templates.ex
be:lib/glific_web/resolvers/interactives.ex
be:lib/glific_web/schema/interactive_template_types.ex
